justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted "the day after tomorrow" as Wednesday, June 3rd, and then correctly understood the user's request to check for availability on that specific day.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively offered alternative slots when the initial request was unavailable and then successfully booked the user's chosen alternative.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information and made appropriate tool calls without any redundant questions or turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear information and successfully booking the appointment.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained full context and intelligently expanded the search to the entire day when the initial specific time was unavailable, then presented the remaining options clearly.
